type_definitions.name: PreCommitTypeSignalsService
type_definitions.description: Existing application_service trait for running pre-commit type signal checks. Referenced for continuity — not modified in this track. The signal evaluation path feeds the infrastructure signal evaluator which is being rewritten for the 3-way diff algorithm (IN-12).

type_definitions.name: PreCommitTypeSignalsInteractor
type_definitions.description: Existing interactor implementing PreCommitTypeSignalsService. Referenced for continuity — not modified in this track.

type_definitions.name: CatalogueSpecSignalsWriter
type_definitions.description: Existing secondary_port for persisting catalogue-spec signal documents. Referenced to expose implements edge for FsCatalogueSpecSignalsStore in infrastructure — not modified in this track.

informal_grounds.summary: R7 declare obligation: FsCatalogueSpecSignalsStore implements CatalogueSpecSignalsWriter; port must be declared in catalogue for implements edge visibility.

type_definitions.name: SchemaExporterPort
type_definitions.description: Existing secondary_port (usecase layer) for exporting crate schema as JSON string. Referenced to expose implements edge for RustdocSchemaExporter in infrastructure — not modified in this track.

informal_grounds.summary: R7 declare obligation: RustdocSchemaExporter implements SchemaExporterPort; port must be declared in catalogue for implements edge visibility.
